## ES5 compatibility checklist (for `dist/code.js`)
- [ ] No `const` or `let` (use `var`)
- [ ] No arrow functions (use `function()`)
- [ ] No `async/await` (use `.then()/.catch()`)
- [ ] No `Object.values()` (use `for...in`)
- [ ] No `?.` or `??` operators
- [ ] No `padStart()` (use manual pad helper)
